name: React TypeScript Webpack Redux Jest Advanced Starter
description: An advanced React starter template using TypeScript with a custom Webpack setup, Redux for state management, and Jest for testing. Optimized for performance with multiple TypeScript loader options and hot reloading support.
features: Custom Webpack configuration for development and production
No Babel — optimized TypeScript-only build pipeline
High-performance setup with ts-loader and awesome-typescript-loader
Comparison scripts for different TypeScript loaders (npm run dev / dev:awesome)
React Hot Loader for fast development experience
